channel.title: 2026-05-08 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-08 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Lecture Notes on Statistical Physics and Neural Networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Olaf Hohm
arXiv:2605.06394v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: These lecture notes introduce some topics of classical statistical physics, particularly those that are relevant for neural networks and deep learning. Statistical physics is treated as a branch of probability theory or statistics, with the goal of making concepts such as phase transitions and the renormalization group accessible to readers without prior knowledge of physics. We introduce the Boltzmann-Gibbs distribution and the thermodynamic potentials on a finite configuration space, notably for Ising spins and spin-glass models on a lattice, and then define phase transitions as discontinuities that arise in the limit that the number of lattice points goes to infinity. We further introduce Hopfield networks and Boltzmann machines, which ar…

item.title: Physics-Grounded Understanding of Thermal Boundary Conductance between Ga₂O₃ and SiC from a Feedforward Neural Network Potential
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Nuohao Liu, Chen Shen, Yue Cao, Song Xue, Pingfan Wu, Zongfang Lin, Masood Mortazavi, Liang Peng, Izabela Szlufarska, Jiechen Wang
arXiv:2605.05620v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Ga₂O₃/SiC heterointegration is attractive for ultra-wide-bandgap power electronics, but interfacial thermal boundary conductance (TBC) remains a major heat-removal bottleneck. Direct experimental access to intrinsic atomistic interfacial transport remains limited, particularly for ideally synthesized materials with defect-free interfacial contact. First-principles simulations are too expensive at relevant length and time scales, while empirical Molecular Dynamics (MD) potentials often lack transferability across oxide and carbide bonding environments. We develop a unified feedforward neural network potential and validate it against density-functional data, bulk phonon dispersions, and anisotropic thermal-conductivity trends in both β-Ga₂O₃ a…

item.title: Density diversity in training data governs thermodynamic transferability of machine learning interatomic potentials
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Minwoo Kim, Seungtae Kim, Je-Yeon Jung, Min Young Ha, Won Bo Lee
arXiv:2605.05733v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) offer first-principles accuracy with reduced computational cost, but their transferability across different thermodynamic states remains questionable, particularly for fluid systems where molecules experience local environments far from crystalline equilibrium. Here, we demonstrate that diversifying the density of training configurations, rather than temperature, is the most effective strategy for building thermodynamically transferable MLIPs within a fixed computational budget. We first show that foundation MLIPs trained on solid-state databases accurately describe liquid-like densities but fail at gas-like conditions, while molecular-database-trained models exhibit the opposite behavior. Co…

item.title: Enabling single-observation decomposition of multi-phase X-ray diffraction patterns via generative deep learning
item.description:
📚 npj Computational Materials
👤 Yusei Ito, Naoya Chiba, Tatsunori Taniai, Ryo Igarashi, Yuta Suzuki, Kotaro Saito 等8位作者
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 08 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02087-w Enabling single-observation decomposition of multi-phase X-ray diffraction patterns via generative deep learning

item.title: Learning to Maximize Quantum Neural Network Expressivity via Effective Rank
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Juan Yao
arXiv:2506.15375v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Quantum neural networks (QNNs) are widely employed as ansätze for solving variational problems, where their expressivity directly impacts performance. Yet, accurately characterizing QNN expressivity remains an open challenge, impeding the optimal design of quantum circuits. In this work, we introduce the effective rank, denoted as κ, as a novel quantitative measure of expressivity. Specifically, κ captures the number of effectively independent parameters among all the variational parameters in a parameterized quantum circuit, thus reflecting the true degrees of freedom contributing to expressivity. Through a systematic analysis considering circuit architecture, input data distributions, and measurement protocols, we demonstrate tha…

item.title: Temporal Coarse-Graining as the Origin of Macroscopic Friction in Quantum Spin Chains via Data-Driven Liouvillian Extraction
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Seiki Saito
arXiv:2605.05604v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Understanding the emergence of macroscopic irreversible hydrodynamics from the reversible unitary dynamics of isolated quantum many-body systems remains a fundamental challenge. Conventional approaches often force spin density dynamics into purely diffusive models, obscuring the microscopic interplay of pressure, spin current, and local friction. Furthermore, reconciling true irreversibility with strictly unitary evolution raises profound questions about the role of the observer's temporal resolution. In this paper, we introduce a fully data-driven framework based on generalized Extended Dynamic Mode Decomposition (gEDMD) integrated with the Mori-Zwanzig projection. By expanding the observable dictionary to explicitly include spin currents…

item.title: Approximate Realization of Four-Dimensional Topological QuantumCodes on Two-Dimensional Architectures via Machine Learning andEntanglement-Assisted Floquet Engineering
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Parham Ghayour
Four-dimensional (4D) topological quantum codes occupy a privileged position in quantum information theory: they are among the only known models exhibiting passive self-correction via macroscopic energy barriers and thermodynamic stability. However, physical quantum hardware is inherently limited to two or three spatial dimensions, making literal implementation of such codes impossible. In this work, we ask a different question: whether the logical and operational features of 4D topology can be approximated on two-dimensional (2D) hardware, even if the underlying phase of matter cannot. We introduce a framework for the approximate realization of 4D topological quantum codes on 2D architectures by combining three resources: synthetic dimensions induced by time-periodic control, entanglemen…

item.title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Learnable Loss Balancing and Transfer Learning
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Reza Pirayeshshirazinezhad
arXiv:2605.05217v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We propose a self-supervised physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework that adaptively balances physics-based and data-driven supervision for scientific machine learning under data scarcity. Unlike prior PINNs that rely on fixed or heuristic weighting of physics residuals and data loss, our approach introduces a learnable blending neuron that dynamically adjusts the relative contribution of each term based on their uncertainties. This mechanism enables stable training and improved generalization without manual tuning. To further enhance efficiency, we integrate a transfer learning strategy that reuses representations from related domains and adapts them to new physical systems with limited data. We validate the framework for the predi…

item.title: 基于可切换范德华p-n异质结的铁电结型晶体管存储器
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Baoyu Wang, Lingrui Zou, Tao Wang, Lijun Xu, Zexin Dong, Chuan Qin, Xin He, Shangui Lan, Yinchang Ma, Meng Tang, Maolin Chen, Chen Liu, Zheng-Dong Luo, Lijie Zhang, Zhenhua Wu, Yan Liu, Genquan Han, Bin Yu, Xixiang Zhang, Kai Chang, Fei Xue
该工作以p型SnSe和n型铁电α-In₂Se₃构建了近理想范德华p-n异质结，实现了0.1 pA的超低反向漏电流和1.95的理想二极管因子。通过铁电极化调控能带对齐，获得了900 meV的巨势垒调制。基于此异质结，作者提出并演示了一种新型铁电结型场效应晶体管存储器，具有1.8 V的大存储窗口、100 ns的超快写入速度、393 K的高工作温度以及2%的低周期涨落。该器件还展现出可靠的突触特性，可用于低功耗神经形态计算。

item.title: 反钙钛矿非共线反铁磁体超快动力学中磁性与光学贡献的解耦
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 J. Kimak, Tomas Ostatnicky, M. Nerodilova, F. Johnson, O. Faiman, T. Trejtnar, D. Boldrin, F. Rendell-Bhatti, J. Zemen, B. Zou, A. P. Mihai, X. Sun, F. Yu, E. Schmoranzerova, L. Nadvornik, L. F. Cohen, P. Nemec
该工作采用泵浦-探测实验研究反钙钛矿非共线反铁磁金属Mn₃NiN与Mn₃GaN薄膜。发现两种材料中飞秒激光诱导的动力学均强烈依赖于样品法向与探测传播方向的夹角，且与泵浦偏振无关。在具有显著反常霍尔效应（Γ₄g相）的Mn₃NiN中，斜入射探测时磁光信号呈现额外的强磁场依赖性；而无反常霍尔效应（Γ₅g相）的Mn₃GaN中信号不依赖磁场。基于Yeh形式体系的完整光学建模与偏振分辨测量，定量分离了磁性与非磁性贡献。

item.title: 利用交错磁性量子磁子构建驱动-耗散型热浴以调控自旋波、畴壁和斯格明子的经典动力学
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Felipe Reyes-Osorio, Branislav K. Nikolic
该工作基于Schwinger-Keldysh场论，在交错磁性绝缘体层中设计了一个非平衡的量子磁子热浴，用以调控相邻铁磁绝缘体层中经典局域自旋的Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert动力学。推导出的扩展LLG方程包含两个空间非局域且各向异性的阻尼项，其中一项还具有时间非局域的非马尔可夫特性。研究展示了如何利用这些特性来调控自旋电子学和磁子学效应。

item.title: 磁场下反铁磁自旋二聚体反铁磁体中零磁化平台的外场诱导局域激发机制
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Myung-Hwan Whangbo, Hyun-Joo Koo, Nikita V. Astakhov, Peter S. Berdonosov, Olga S. Volkova
该工作研究了由反铁磁自旋二聚体组成的某些反铁磁体在单离子各向异性可忽略情况下仍出现零磁化平台的成因。通过分析磁场对由两个自旋-1/2离子组成的反铁磁自旋二聚体链能谱的影响，并结合氯化钾铜在2 K下磁场依赖的比热测量，揭示了外场诱导局域激发导致零磁化平台的机制。该工作围绕磁场下反铁磁二聚体系统的量子相变和磁化平台展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 滑移双层交替磁体铁谷态的内禀反铁磁半金属与拓扑相
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shihao Zhang
该工作在滑移双层交替磁体的铁谷态中发现了内禀反铁磁半金属和拓扑相。利用具有小能隙的交替磁体单层构建双层系统，层间跃迁导致能隙减小，滑移工程诱导铁谷态。以V₂OSSe为例，第一性原理计算表明铁谷态中的自旋依赖层间跃迁确保一个谷（一个自旋通道）具有直接带隙，而另一谷（相反自旋通道）发生能带反转，表现为内禀反铁磁半金属。微观模型和有效哈密顿量确认了滑移交替磁体双层中普遍的自旋依赖层间跃迁。进一步计算暗示存在陈绝缘体和无能隙表面态，调节滑移方向可实现相变。

item.title: 自旋-轨道耦合非磁性中心对称系统中光诱导偶波自旋劈裂
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xiao-Jiao Wang, Dongling Liu, Di Zhu, Zheng-Yang Zhuang, Zhongbo Yan
该工作打破了自旋劈裂的奇偶二分法：传统上相对论自旋-轨道耦合产生奇宇称劈裂，非相对论磁交换耦合产生偶宇称劈裂。研究表明圆偏振光可在中心对称非磁性系统中动态产生偶宇称自旋劈裂，其对称性由底层轨道的角动量特征控制，可实现s波、d波和g波自旋劈裂能带结构，与铁磁体和交错磁体中的能带相同。这些自旋劈裂能带可自然承载陈数绝缘体相。该结果建立了两种基本自旋劈裂机制之间此前未被认识的概念联系。

item.title: 陈数铁磁体中自旋极化子的微观理论
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Qiang Gao, Eslam Khalaf
该工作发展了SU(2)陈数铁磁体中带电激发的微观理论，得到了束缚任意数量自旋翻转的电荷-e自旋极化子态的闭合形式波函数。在理想陈数-1能带中，这些极化子是哈密顿量的精确本征态；偏离理想极限时，通过引入单一尺寸参数和几何信息修饰构建变分族。动量空间波函数具有两种等价表示：魏尔斯特拉斯函数的贾斯特罗因子之比，或粒子-空穴波函数的反称化双电子乘积，后者可实现大系统尺寸和多自旋翻转的高效计算。在最低朗道能级基准测试中，单自旋翻转拟设与精确对角化的重叠度达99%以上。

item.title: 节线半金属中的量子振荡与非饱和磁电阻
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Rui Min, Yi-Xiang Wang
该工作研究节线半金属（以EuGa₄为动机）的磁输运性质，聚焦量子振荡与非饱和磁电阻效应。理论分析表明，特征环形费米面导致两个 distinct 振荡频率，可作为节线半金属的重要实验指纹。计算显示低能区磁电阻虽随磁场非饱和增长，但其比值远小于实验报道值，提示需进一步考虑其他物理机制。

item.title: 氧空位掺杂金属性EuTiO₃₋δ的电荷输运与磁序调控
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xing He, Chiou Yang Tan, Issam Khayr, Zach Van Fossan, Richard J. Spieker, Dayu Zhai, Sarah Anderson, Dinesh Shukla, Suchismita Sarker, Javier Garcia-Barriocanal, Turan Birol, Martin Greven
该研究利用CaH₂作为吸氧剂对EuTiO₃进行氧空位掺杂，实现了高于以往报道的载流子浓度（约10²¹ cm⁻³），发现氧空位掺杂体系的相图与阳离子掺杂截然不同。实验揭示金属态下存在从反铁磁到铁磁序的转变，最高居里温度约11 K；密度泛函理论计算证实最近邻磁交换常数随电子掺杂显著变化。X射线漫散射与第一性原理结果还表明该体系存在类似其他材料的结构特征。

item.title: 揭示(Fe,Mn,Ga)₂O₃铁氧体亚铁磁特征起源：结构不可检测的尖晶石杂质作用
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Evgeniya Moshkina, Yuriy Knyazev, Ekaterina Smorodina, Oleg Bayukov, Maxim Molokeev, Evgeniy Khramov, Andrey Kartashev, Ruslan Batulin, Mikhail Cherosov, Dmitriy Velikanov, Evgeniy Eremin, Mikhail Rautskii, Dieter Kokh, Mikhail Platunov, Leonard Bezmaternykh
该工作研究了三种不同Mn:Fe:Ga比的Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃:Ga固溶体及无镓参考样品的磁态，通过EDX、粉末XRD和XAS详细分析实际化学成分与晶体结构。磁测量和Mössbauer谱学发现低温磁异常，结合结构分析表明这些样品的亚铁磁特征可能源于常规结构表征无法检测的尖晶石杂质相。该研究为理解Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃体系长期争议的磁性质提供了新视角。

item.title: A self-consistent computational framework for displacive ferroelectrics from the condensed ground state
item.description:
📚 npj Computational Materials
👤 Fei Yang, Long-Qing Chen
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 08 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02102-0 A self-consistent computational framework for displacive ferroelectrics from the condensed ground state

item.title: Ultrafast spin dynamics in altermagnetic Cr 2 Se 2 O monolayer
item.description:
📚 npj Computational Materials
👤 Tianxia Guo, Yinlu Gao, Jijun Zhao, Xue Jiang
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 08 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02108-8 Ultrafast spin dynamics in altermagnetic Cr 2 Se 2 O monolayer

item.title: Uniaxial spin texture in a superconducting electron gas revealed by exchange interactions
item.description:
📚 AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
👤 Junyi Yang, Changjiang Liu, Xianjing Zhou, Hanyu Hou, Kaijun Yin, Jianguo Wen, John Pearson, Alexey Suslov, Dafei Jin, Jidong S. Jiang, Ulrich Welp, Jian-Min Zuo, Michael R. Norman, Anand Bhattacharya
Science Advances, Volume 12, Issue 19, May 2026.

item.title: Data-driven reconstruction of band dispersion and quantum geometry via Koopman dynamical mode decomposition
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yiming Pan, Jinze He, Jiapeng Yang, Zhiwei Fan
arXiv:2605.06199v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a data-driven framework for reconstructing band structures using Koopman operator analysis and dynamic mode decomposition (Koopman-DMD). Instead of deriving spectra from an explicit Hamiltonian, the approach reconstructs band dispersion and modal dynamics directly from spatiotemporal data, including wavefunctions and observables. This framework establishes a correspondence between Hamiltonian Floquet-Bloch decomposition and Koopman-DMD, whereby the extracted DMD modes encode frequencies, decay or growth rates, spatial profiles and projection weights. These quantities allow the reconstruction of spectral functions, local density of states, and delocalized-to-localized measures such as the inverse participation ratio. Also, these ex…

item.title: No Triangulation Without Representation: Generalization in Topological Deep Learning
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Johannes S. Schmidt, Martin Carrasco, Ernst Röell, Guy Wolf, Nello Blaser, Bastian Rieck
arXiv:2605.06467v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Despite an ever-increasing interest in topological deep learning models that target higher-order datasets, there is no consensus on how to evaluate such models. This is exacerbated by the fact that topological objects permit operations, such as structural refinements, that are not appropriate for graph data. In this work, we extend MANTRA, a benchmark dataset containing manifold triangulations, to a larger class of manifolds with more diverse homeomorphism types. We show that, unlike prior claims, both graph neural networks (GNNs) and higher-order message passing (HOMP) methods can saturate the benchmark. However, we find that this is contingent on the right representation and feature assignment, emphasizing their importance in baseline mode…

item.title: Tunable Multi‐Level Memory States in Compositionally Graded Lead‐Free Ferroelectric Thin Films
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Jinyang Li, Suzhen Liu, Tao Wang, Zhongqi Ren, Cheng Gao, Fenghui Gong, Xiaodong Lv, Chen Su, Sujit Das, Hao Pan, Yunlong Tang, Zuhuang Chen
Advanced Materials, Volume 38, Issue 26, 8 May 2026.

item.title: Fe2-xZnxMo3O8亚铁磁体中手性杂化声子磁矩的磁控调控
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Youngsu Choi, Dirk Wulferding, Amit Pawbake, Clément Faugeras, Sivasakthi Kuppusamy, Raman Sankar, Gichan Son, Jeongwoo Kim, Kwang‐Yong Choi
该工作围绕Fe2-xZnxMo3O8亚铁磁体展开，研究磁控手段对手性杂化声子磁矩的调控作用，探索声子与自旋自由度耦合的新机制，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: Multibit Ferroelectric HfZrO Memcapacitor for Non‐Volatile Analogue Memory and Reconfigurable Electronics
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Deepika Yadav, Spyros Stathopoulos, Patrick Foster, Andreas Tsiamis, Mohamed Awadein, Hannah Levene, Themis Prodromakis
Advanced Functional Materials, Volume 36, Issue 37, 7 May 2026.

item.title: Attention is all you need to solve chiral superconductivity
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Chun-Tse Li, Tzen Ong, Max Geier, Hsin Lin, Liang Fu
arXiv:2509.03683v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Recent advances on neural quantum states have shown that correlations between quantum particles can be efficiently captured by attention -- a foundation of modern neural architectures that enables neural networks to learn the relation between objects. In this work, we show that a general-purpose self-attention Fermi neural network is able to find chiral pₓ ± ip_y superconductivity in an attractive Fermi gas by energy minimization, without prior knowledge or bias towards pairing. The superconducting state is identified from the optimized wavefunction by measuring various physical observables. We develop a symmetry projection method that reveals the ground state angular momentum and time-reversal symmetry breaking, and a computation of the…

item.title: Competing nonlinearities, criticality, and order-to-chaos transition in deep networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Omri Lesser, Debanjan Chowdhury
arXiv:2605.05294v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deep neural networks owe their expressive power to nonlinear activation functions. The effective field theory of signal propagation at initialization reveals a few distinct universality classes of activations that exhibit different depth scaling. Tuning across these, especially with analytical control, is an open problem. We show that a statistical mixture of activations, where each neuron independently and randomly draws its activation from a two-component distribution with mixing fraction p, provides a new mechanism for a continuous phase transition. Applied to a mixture of Tanh and Swish, the transition is sharp in the depth scaling of the preactivation variance, separating a variance-collapsing from a variance-inflating phase; at p_c, th…

item.title: Universal Neural Propagator: Learning Time Evolution in Many-Body Quantum Systems
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zihao Qi, Christopher Earls, Yang Peng
arXiv:2605.05299v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Conventional approaches to simulating quantum many-body dynamics produce a single trajectory: if the Hamiltonian or the initial state is changed, the computation must be re-performed. Recent efforts toward foundation models have begun to address this limitation, yet existing methods transfer across either Hamiltonians or initial states, but not both. In this work, we introduce the Universal Neural Propagator (UNP), a single, unified model that learns the functional mapping from driving protocols to time-evolution propagators. Trained in an entirely self-supervised way, a single UNP model predicts dynamics across a function space of driving protocols and an exponentially large Hilbert space of initial states simultaneously. We benchmark on…

item.title: Polarizable atomic multipoles for learning long-range electrostatics
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Dongjin Kim, Daniel S. King, Yoonjae Park, Roya Savoj, Sebastien Hamel, Xiaoyu Wang, Bingqing Cheng
arXiv:2605.05746v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-range electrostatics and polarization remain central obstacles to extending machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) to ionic, polar, and interfacial systems. Here, we introduce a semi-local framework for learning electrostatics from energies and forces using polarizable atomic multipoles. Local equivariant descriptors predict environment-dependent latent monopoles, dipoles, and quadrupoles, while residual non-local charge transfer and polarization are captured by non-self-consistent linear response in induced charges and dipoles. Across four diverse benchmarks and four short-range MLIP architectures, the multipole hierarchy and response terms systematically improve potential energy surface accuracy, with the largest gains in sys…

item.title: INEUS: Iterative Neural Solver for High-Dimensional PIDEs
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jean-Loup Dupret, Davide Gallon, Patrick Cheridito
arXiv:2605.06281v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In this paper, we introduce INEUS, a meshfree iterative neural solver for partial integro-differential equations (PIDEs). The method replaces the explicit evaluation of nonlocal jump integrals with single-jump sampling and reformulates PIDE solving as a sequence of recursive regression problems. Like Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), INEUS learns global solutions over the entire space-time domain, yet it offers a more efficient treatment of nonlocal terms and avoids the computationally expensive differentiation of full PIDE residuals. These features make INEUS particularly well suited for high-dimensional PDEs and PIDEs. Supported by a contraction-based convergence proof for linear PIDEs, our numerical experiments show that INEUS del…

item.title: 微磁模拟中投影与非投影方案的比较研究
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Changjian Xie
该工作从连续性方程出发，论证磁化强度恒定约束可由方程本身自动保持，进而离散化连续性方程并比较两种一阶半隐式时间策略：隐式Gauss-Seidel方法与半隐式向后差分公式（BDF）方法。微磁模拟结果表明，当耗散系数较大时，无投影步的隐式Gauss-Seidel方法与有投影步的方法在达到的稳态上存在显著差异。该研究为微磁模拟中投影步骤的必要性提供了系统性评估。

item.title: 插层二维磁体中的电控热辅助磁记录
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Josue Rodriguez, Ruishi Qi, Catherine Xu, Feng Wang, James G. Analytis, Hossein Taghinejad
该研究提出了一种电子学方案实现热辅助磁记录（HAMR），利用低电流密度脉冲的焦耳热进行数据写入，并通过反常霍尔效应实现电子学读出。在插层二维磁体Ni₁/₄TaSe₂中，实验证实电流脉冲可将材料加热至居里温度以上，此时仅需约2 mT的小磁场（为矫顽力的1/100）即可完成写入，突破了传统HAMR对激光光学和等离激元换能器的依赖。

item.title: s波超导近邻二维电子气边界涌现的自旋量子霍尔边缘态
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 M. V. Parfenov, V. S. Khrapai, I. S. Burmistrov
该研究论证了量化磁场下二维电子气-超导体杂化结构虽呈现非整数、无序敏感的电荷电导，但拓扑保护在自旋输运通道中得以保持。该体系属于Altland-Zirnbauer分类的C类，支持偶数量子化的横向自旋电导率——自旋量子霍尔效应。作者证明2DEG-S杂化体系承载偶数量子化、抗无序的自旋电导拓扑保护边缘态，并提出通过电学测量探测该保护的实验方案，为检测手性Andreev边缘态的C类起源提供具体途径。

item.title: 通过晶格几何工程化量子多体疤痕
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Erick Parra Verde, Kevin P. Mours, Johannes Zeiher, Ana Hudomal, Jad C. Halimeh
该工作证明晶格几何本身可作为诱导和增强量子多体疤痕的实验可及调控手段。将一维链变换为准一维三角形装饰晶格后，PXP模型中通常热化的全极化态展现出显著的保真度复苏、缓慢的纠缠增长以及与弱纠缠本征态塔的强烈重叠。这一行为源于约束希尔伯特空间的几何诱导重构：邻接图分解为超立方子图，强制相干粒子数转移并稳定涌现的近似su(2)代数。该方案可在光镊束缚的里德伯原子可编程阵列中实现，通过空间光调制器构建三角形装饰几何并用时间分辨探测研究疤痕动力学。

item.title: 铁轴序下的光致非线性埃德尔斯坦效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Akimitsu Kirikoshi, Satoru Hayami
该工作提出将光致非线性埃德尔斯坦效应（NLEE）——即时变电场诱导静态磁化的二阶光学响应——作为探测铁轴序（原子排列自发旋转畸变）的有效手段。作者阐明了NLEE张量与电环偶极矩的关系，发现线偏振光和圆偏振光通过不同机制与电环偶极矩耦合。基于包含铁轴序的最小模型，研究表明轨道磁化与自旋-轨道耦合的有效耦合诱导出自旋磁化，其倾斜角度反映了铁轴起源SOC与相对论SOC的强度比值。

item.title: 超导混合CORC-TSTC电缆中传输交流损耗的大幅抑制
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hasan N. Al-Ssalih, Antonio Badía-Majós, Harold S. Ruiz
高电流超导电缆是下一代电力传输系统的关键使能技术，但其部署常受传输交流损耗限制。该工作采用经实验验证的全三维电磁模型，研究混合CORC-TSTC电缆在自场条件下的电流注入策略对电动力学行为的影响。通过比较非绝缘馈电（共用连接）与绝缘馈电（独立供电）两种构型，揭示了电气耦合对内部电流重分布的调控机制，为降低交流损耗提供了设计思路。

item.title: 超导体间Casimir力的测量
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Matthijs H. J. de Jong, Evren Korkmazgil, Louise Banniard, Mika A. Sillanpää, Laure Mercier de Lépinay
该工作通过微波光力腔中超导鼓膜谐振器的非线性动力学，观测到Casimir力对谐振器的作用。Casimir力源于电磁场的量子涨落，在紧密间距的导电物体间产生非线性吸引力。测量到的动力学指向一种极强的力，其量级与器件真空间距范围内的Casimir力相符，而与其他已知非线性来源的估计不符。该非线性强度足以使改进设计的此类器件运行于单声子非线性区域，为探究超导转变附近低频贡献对Casimir效应的影响提供了新途径。

item.title: 非线性霍尔量子振荡探测石墨烯莫尔体系中的拓扑Brown-Zak费米子
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jinrui Zhong, Huimin Peng, Yuqing Hu, Qi Feng, Qiuli Li, Shihao Zhang, Qinsheng Wang, Jinhai Mao, Junxi Duan, Yugui Yao
该研究提出并实验探测了一种新型二阶非线性霍尔效应量子振荡，源于磁场下主导NLHE机制随Bloch态周期性交替变化。该方法可灵敏检测Brown-Zak费米子，起始场低至0.5 T；当满足公度条件时，Brown-Zak费米子的非线性输运主要由量子几何贡献主导。该发现不仅建立了新型量子振荡，还首次实验展示了量子几何对非线性输运的支配作用。

item.title: Optimal quantum reservoir learning in proximity to universality
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Moein N. Ivaki, Matias Karjula, Tapio Ala-Nissila
arXiv:2510.18623v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The study of the boundary between classically simulable and computationally complex quantum dynamics is fundamental to understanding which physical resources may enable enhanced information-processing capabilities. We investigate this within the framework of quantum reservoir computing by introducing a tunable N-qubit random circuit model, where a fraction p of Clifford gates are probabilistically substituted with nonstabilizing conditional-hatT gates. We establish a direct correspondence between the reservoir's performance on temporal processing tasks and its entanglement spectrum statistics and long-range nonstabilizer resource content. To assess scalability, we study the scaling of the anti-flatness of states in the large-N limi…

item.title: 自旋-轨道耦合超导体中的配对破缺与维度效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Reiley Dorrian, Mizuki Ohno, Elena Williams, Adrian Llanos, Joseph Falson
该研究采用多机制Kharitonov-Feigel'man框架，分析了超薄LaBi₂薄膜在平行磁场下的厚度依赖超导性。通过解析薄极限下的磁场增强超导现象，估计了自旋交换散射、顺磁效应和轨道效应的相对贡献。研究为二维超导体中临界温度、Pauli极限及散射时间的理解提供了新视角。

item.title: Pro-张量网络
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Gen Yue, Ansi Bai, Linqian Wu, Tian Lan
该工作引入了pro-张量网络，作为张量网络的范畴化，为研究"多体-多体理论"提供了严格且图形透明的框架。提供了完整的图形计算工具箱，并将Levin-Wen模型恢复为"均匀"pro-张量网络，同时推广了Kitaev和Kong的结果，将粒子表征为promonad上的模。该框架还适用于广义对称性和拓扑全息的研究，且无需半单性、有限性和刚性等假设。

item.title: 利用超导邻近效应探测多层二碲化钨边缘态的拓扑保护
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 X. Ballu, Z. Dou, L. Bugaud, R. Delagrange, A. Bernard, Ratnadwip Singha, L. M. Schoop, R. J. Cava, R. Deblock, Sophie Gueron, H. Bouchiat, M. Ferrier
该工作通过制备超导量子干涉器件（SQUID）来探测WTe₂多层晶体边缘态的拓扑保护。WTe₂作为具有强自旋-轨道耦合的过渡金属硫族化合物，其拓扑性质兼具II型外尔半金属和二阶拓扑绝缘体（SOTI）特征。在SQUID中，晶体边缘结的超电流与体结超电流发生干涉，观测到从对称到非对称的多种SQUID图样，其中一种磁场调制揭示了边缘结的锯齿波状超电流-相位关系，表明边缘超电流由超过600 nm的弹道通道传输，这是WTe₂具有SOTI特征的确凿证据。

item.title: 内禀非线性霍尔效应的量子几何起源
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yannis Ulrich, Johannes Mitscherling, Laura Classen, Andreas P. Schnyder
该工作在完全量子力学的投影算符形式体系中，将通用多带系统的内禀二阶非线性霍尔效应（NLHE）分解为其量子几何贡献。通过将非线性电导率按准粒子寿命τ的幂次展开，在τ¹阶恢复了已建立的Berry曲率偶极，并澄清了此前文献中关于τ⁰阶（带间）量子度规矩偶极（或Berry曲率极化率）贡献的分歧。关键发现是τ⁰阶存在一个由带内量子度规矩偶极（intraQMD）决定的额外贡献，源于完全量子力学处理中捕获的附加虚带间跃迁。intraQMD贡献在破坏时间反演对称性的系统中普遍非零，可通过对称性与其他几何贡献区分。对拓扑能带交叉低能模型的解析结果展示了能带拓扑如何影响各项贡献。

item.title: 硼掺杂超薄碳纳米管网络中高压效应高温超导特征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Y. Wang, T. H. Koo, R. Huang, Y. H. Ng, T. T. Lortz, T. Zhang, W. M. Chan, Y. Hou, J. Pan, S. Krämer, A. Demuer, R. Lortz, N. Wang, P. Sheng
该工作报道了在ZSM-5沸石约5埃通道内生长的硼掺杂超薄碳纳米管（CNT）三维网络中存在高温超导的证据。限域效应稳定了原本动态不稳定的(2,1)CNT，硼掺杂将费米能级推向van Hove奇点，得到第一性计算支持。所得CNT网络在环境压力下展现多重相互一致的超导特征：直流磁化和交流磁化率测量显示220-250 K间出现迈斯纳响应，致密化样品实现高达93%的全抗磁屏蔽；电输运显示外推Tc约239 K的尖锐电阻转变，优化样品电阻归零；比热测量在233-236 K显示可重复异常，磁场下展宽与强超导涨落一致；点接触谱识别出三个超导能隙，包括约30 meV的主导能隙，其温度依赖符合BCS预期。

item.title: 自旋-1/2四聚体链的自旋序、自旋激发与RIXS谱
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Junli Li, Jun-Qing Cheng, Trinanjan Datta, Dao-Xin Yao
该工作结合密度矩阵重正化群、量子重正化群和微扰理论，研究了一维自旋-1/2海森堡四聚体链的自旋动力学。计算了能级、量子相图，分析了相变，并评估了分数化和集体（单粒子和多粒子）激发的L边和K边共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）谱。发现该链可在隐藏Z₂×Z₂离散对称性保持的四聚体相与具有非零弦序、破坏隐藏对称性的Haldane相之间转变，两能隙相之间由包含自由自旋和三格点双重态的退禁闭量子临界态介入。该链支持分数化自旋子激发和集体三重子、五重子激发，在铁磁极限下五重子激发具有五重简并激发态。

item.title: 流体与晶体中费米子的自旋-电荷群：一般结构及物理效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Arist Zhenyuan Yang, Zheng-Xin Liu
作者引入自旋-电荷群（SCGs）作为描述费米系统中自旋、电荷与空间自由度各种耦合的统一框架。SCGs将自旋和电荷操作作为'内部'对称性，时空操作作为'外部'对称性，并包含其耦合与投影扭曲。在推导SCGs的一般群结构后，文章探讨了其在³He超流、4e电荷超导体、具有自旋通量的共线磁体以及共存磁序超导体等具体系统中的应用，表明SCGs可强制产生额外的能带简并、陈数和交叉自旋-电荷响应，为强关联体系中新奇物相的分类与探索提供了对称性途径。

item.title: 体心立方晶格有效哈伯德模型中的超导与关联相
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Theja N. De Silva
该工作研究受碱金属掺杂富勒烯固体启发的体心立方晶格有效哈伯德模型，包含重整化在位相互作用与源于电声子耦合的有效反转洪德耦合。采用两种互补方法：中等耦合区将 onsite 排斥近似为动量空间长程相互作用，得到可精确求解的Hatsugai-Kohmoto模型加BCS型配对项，分析超导不稳定性并展示一级正常-超导相变；强耦合区运用自旋旋转不变奴隶玻色子方法，绘出温度-相互作用相图，揭示费米液体、反铁磁与莫特绝缘相之间的一级转变。

item.title: 基于Timepix探测器网络实时数据的MoEDAL实验混合辐射场分析
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Benedikt Bergmann, Petr Burian, Josef Janeček, Claude Leroy, Petr Mánek, James Pinfold, Stanislav Pospíšil, Richard Soluk, Michal Suk
本工作旨在测定LHC上MoEDAL实验环境中快中子、其他强子及高电离粒子的通量与特性，这些粒子构成MoEDAL被动核径迹探测器搜寻狄拉克磁单极子轨迹的本底。研究基于2013-2018年运行的Timepix混合硅像素探测器网络实时数据，分析混合辐射场的成分、能谱特性及各辐射分量在不同实验区域的方向特征，重点呈现中子与高电离粒子的方向分布等详细结果。

item.title: Learning Gaussian optical states with quantum computers
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Spencer Dimitroff, John Kallaugher, Ashe Miller, Mohan Sarovar
arXiv:2605.05325v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent results have established dramatic advantages in learning properties of quantum states when a quantum computer is available to process or jointly measure multiple copies of the unknown quantum state. Learning tasks can be accomplished with exponentially fewer copies of the state when compared to optimized classical learning strategies that are restricted to measuring one copy of the state at a time. While these results were established in abstract settings and for artificial learning tasks, they motivate the application of quantum computers to imaging and sensing of weak electromagnetic fields since these settings are ultimately concerned with the learning of unknown quantum states. In this work we apply these new results in quantum…

item.title: Learning-optimized qubit mapping and reuse to minimize intercore communication in modular quantum architectures
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Applied
👤 Sokea Sang, Leanghok Hour, and Youngsun Han
Author(s): Sokea Sang, Leanghok Hour, and Youngsun Han Modular quantum architectures have emerged as a promising approach for scaling quantum computing systems by connecting multiple quantum processing units. However, this approach introduces significant challenges due to costly intercore operations between chips and quantum state transfers, which contr… [Phys. Rev. Applied 25, 054023] Published Fri May 08, 2026

item.title: Topological order in neural wavefunctions
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Ahmed Abouelkomsan, Max Geier, and Liang Fu
Author(s): Ahmed Abouelkomsan, Max Geier, and Liang Fu Topologically ordered states are among the most interesting quantum phases of matter that host emergent quasiparticles having fractional charge and obeying fractional quantum statistics. Theoretical study of such states is however challenging owing to their strong-coupling nature that prevents conve… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 205119] Published Fri May 08, 2026

item.title: Offline Reinforcement Learning for Rotation Profile Control in Tokamaks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Rohit Sonker, Hiro Josep Farre Kaga, Jiayu Chen, Andrew Rothstein, Ian Char, Ricardo Shousha, Egemen Kolemen, Jeff Schneider
arXiv:2605.05857v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Tokamaks remain leading candidates for achieving practical fusion energy, yet many important control problems inside these devices are still difficult or unsolved. One such challenge is controlling the plasma rotation profile, which strongly influences stability, confinement, and transport. While the average rotation can be controlled, controlling the full profile is challenging due to high dimensionality, response to multiple actuators and dependence on plasma condition. Learning-based control methods, such as reinforcement learning (RL), provide a potential solution to this challenging problem with ability to model complex interactions leading to effective multi-input multi-output control. However, learning such policies is challenging due…

item.title: From Drops to Grid: Noise-Aware Spatio-Temporal Neural Process for Rainfall Estimation
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Rafael Pablos Sarabia, Joachim Nyborg, Morten Birk, Ira Assent
arXiv:2605.05912v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: High-resolution rainfall observations are crucial for weather forecasting, water management, and hazard mitigation. Traditional operational measurements are often biased and low-resolution, limiting their ability to capture local rainfall. Accurate high-resolution rainfall maps require integrating sparse surface observations, yet existing deep learning densification methods are hindered by rainfall's skewed, localized nature, noise, and limited spatio-temporal fusion. We present DropsToGrid, a Neural Process-based method that generates dense rainfall fields by fusing temporal sequences from noisy, irregularly distributed private weather stations with spatial context from radar. Leveraging multi-scale feature extraction, temporal attention, a…

item.title: 机器学习增强气候预测精度以促进农业碳减排
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Huiling Wu, Xuemei Liu
该工作提出物理约束集成学习框架，融合卫星遥感、地面监测与再分析数据构建时空自适应气候预测结构，建立双向耦合的气候-碳排放交互模型量化温降水对土壤呼吸、稻田甲烷及化肥氧化亚氮排放的动态影响，并开发预测驱动的多目标优化算法支持种植制度与农艺管理的智能调控。华北平原冬小麦-夏玉米轮作区实验验证了框架的有效性。

item.title: Demonstrating real advantage of machine learning–enhanced Monte Carlo for combinatorial optimization
item.description:
📚 PNAS
👤 Luca Maria Del BonoFederico Ricci-TersenghiFrancesco Zamponiahttps://ror.org/02be6w209Dipartimento di Fisica, Sapienza Università di Roma, Rome 00185, Italybhttps://ror.org/00bc51d88CNR-Nanotec, Rome unit, Rome 00185, ItalycIstituto Nazionale di Fisica Nucleare, sezione di Roma1, Rome 00185, Italy
Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, Volume 123, Issue 19, May 2026. SignificanceIn this work, we address a question that has attracted intense interest in recent years: whether machine learning-assisted algorithms can genuinely outperform classical approaches in challenging combinatorial optimization problems. While ...

item.title: MOSAIC: Module Discovery via Sparse Additive Identifiable Causal Learning for Scientific Time Series
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shicheng Fan, Nour Elhendawy, Jianle Sun, Ke Fang, Kun Zhang, Yihang Wang, Lu Cheng
arXiv:2605.05524v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Causal representation learning (CRL) seeks to recover latent variables with identifiability guarantees, typically up to permutation and component-wise reparameterization under appropriate assumptions. However, identifiability does not imply interpretability: latent semantics are typically assigned post hoc by alignment with known ground-truth factors. This limitation is particularly acute in scientific time series, where underlying mechanisms are unknown and discovering interpretable structure is a primary goal. In contrast, scientific observations (such as residue-pair distances, climate indices, or process sensors) are inherently semantic, as they correspond to named physical quantities. This raises a key question: can the interpretability…

item.title: Region-adaptable retrieval of coastal biogeochemical parameters from near-surface hyperspectral remote sensing reflectance using physics-aware meta-learning
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yiqing Guo, Nagur R. C. Cherukuru, Eric A. Lehmann, S. L. Kesav Unnithan, Tim J. Malthus, Gemma Kerrisk, Xiubin Qi, Faisal Islam, Tisham Dhar, Mark J. Doubell
arXiv:2605.05623v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Hyperspectral in situ sensing has shown promise in retrieving aquatic biogeochemical (BGC) parameters, such as total suspended solids, dissolved organic carbon, and total chlorophyll-a, for cost-effective monitoring of coastal water quality. However, generalising such retrieval algorithms across water bodies remains challenging, as the relationship between remote sensing reflectance (Rrs) and BGC parameters can vary considerably from one region to another due to regional distinctions in environmental conditions and biogeochemistry that lead to different BGC ranges and bio-optical properties. In this study, we propose a two-stage physics-aware meta-learning framework for retrieving coastal BGC parameters from near-surface Rrs observations. In…

item.title: Dynamic Stress‐Regulating Molecular Networks Directing Oriented Growth in FAPbI3 Perovskites
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Lei Li, Zhixian Sun, Shaoyu Chen, Junbo Wang, Mengzhu Ding, Qingyun He, Mengyang Wu, Chongyu Zhong, Xiangru Zhao, Shuaijun Yan, Tianshi Qin, Wei Huang, Kang Shen, Renzhi Li, Yi Yuan, Fangfang Wang
Advanced Functional Materials, Volume 36, Issue 37, 7 May 2026.

item.title: A Basin-Selection Perspective on Grokking via Singular Learning Theory
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ben Cullen, Sergio Estan-Ruiz, Riya Danait, Jiayi Li
arXiv:2603.01192v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Grokking, the abrupt transition from memorization to generalisation after extended training, suggests the presence of competing solution basins with distinct statistical properties. We study this phenomenon through the lens of Singular Learning Theory (SLT), a Bayesian framework that characterizes the geometry of the loss landscape. The key measure is the local learning coefficient (LLC) which quantifies the local degeneracy of the loss surface. SLT links lower-LLC basins to higher posterior mass concentration and lower expected generalisation error. Leveraging SLT, we develop a basin-selection perspective on grokking in quadratic networks: LLC ranks competing near-zero-loss basins by statistical preference, while the training-time trans…
